### What you want

<!-- One or two sentences describing the feature. -->

### Why it matters

<!-- What problem does this solve for you? What's the use case?
     "Nice to have" is a valid answer — just say so. -->

### How you'd imagine it working

<!-- Optional. Sketch the UX if you have ideas. Where would the toggle live?
     What happens when you click it? -->

### Existing alternatives

<!-- Are you doing this manually right now? Using another tool?
     Knowing what you're working around helps us scope the feature right. -->
